final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×4 vertical nine-grid poster for Xiaohongshu, designed to be cut into 9 individual cards on a sleep-wellness theme, in the warm stillness of a curated lifestyle editorial.

Style/medium: clean editorial knowledge-card design with the matte warmth of a premium lifestyle magazine spread, light illustrative accents in a reductive flat style, grid-based layout with visible cell borders for clean cutting
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout, each cell self-contained and centered, clear dividing lines or fine borders between all cells, no text or title placed near any grid boundary, every cell functions as an independent Xiaohongshu card while sharing a unified visual identity
Subject:
  Cell 1 (Cover) — hero card: large headline「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」, sub-headline「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」, soft bed illustration with moon, pillow, eye mask, dominant typographic layout, most visually striking cell
  Cell 2 — title「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」, body「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」, small illustration of phone + moon + sleepy face
  Cell 3 — title「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」, body「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」, small illustration of bedside lamp + warm glow + curtains
  Cell 4 — title「3. 房间温度别太高」, body「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」, small illustration of air conditioner + thermometer + blanket
  Cell 5 — title「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」, body「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」, small illustration of coffee cup + tea cup + prohibition symbol
  Cell 6 — title「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」, body「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」, small illustration of bathroom steam + towel + hot water
  Cell 7 — title「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」, body「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」, small illustration of notebook + pen + small desk lamp
  Cell 8 — title「7. 固定上床时间」, body「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」, small illustration of clock + moon + bed
  Cell 9 — title「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」, body「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」, small footer text「收藏这组，今晚试试看」, illustration of breathing wave lines + closed-eyes figure + stars
Scene/backdrop: soft cream-white background across all cells, each cell has its own gentle breathing room with generous white space
Lighting/mood: the quiet warmth of a bedside lamp at 10pm — honey-toned, unhurried, the kind of light that tells the body it is safe to rest
Color palette: cream white, pale oat, light caramel, and soft beige as the dominant field; deep brown for all body text and titles; warm amber accents in illustrations; the palette of a cashmere blanket in late evening
Materials/textures: matte paper feel, flat illustrative elements with subtle softness, no gloss, no gradients except the gentlest warm-to-neutral wash
Text (verbatim): 让你倒头就睡的8个 tips／失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏／1. 睡前1小时别玩手机／蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。／2. 睡前把灯光调暗／暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。／3. 房间温度别太高／稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。／4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡／咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。／5. 睡前洗个热水澡／能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。／6. 脑子停不下来就写下来／把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。／7. 固定上床时间／每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。／8. 试试深呼吸放松法／吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。／收藏这组，今晚试试看
Constraints: all text in Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters; large legible type in every cell; grid lines clearly visible for post-production cutting; each cell content fully centered and not bleeding into borders; unified visual language across all 9 cells; female-oriented wellness aesthetic
Avoid: cheap marketing feel, overly decorative or busy layouts, English text, text placed near cut lines, dark backgrounds, high-contrast neon colors, generic stock-poster clichés

Text (verbatim): 让你倒头就睡的8个 tips／失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏／1. 睡前1小时别玩手机／蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。／2. 睡前把灯光调暗／暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。／3. 房间温度别太高／稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。／4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡／咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。／5. 睡前洗个热水澡／能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。／6. 脑子停不下来就写下来／把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。／7. 固定上床时间／每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。／8. 试试深呼吸放松法／吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。／收藏这组，今晚试试看
